section.title: Before you choose.
section.subtitle: Can't find your answer here? Message us on WhatsApp.

questions.q: Do you provide certificates for gold and diamond jewellery?
questions.a: Yes. Eligible gold jewellery includes hallmarking details, and certified diamond or gemstone pieces include relevant grading or quality documentation.

questions.q: How far in advance should I plan bridal jewellery?
questions.a: We recommend starting 2-3 months before the wedding for custom sets, outfit matching, sizing, and family gifting coordination.

questions.q: Can I customise an existing design?
questions.a: Yes. We can adjust size, polish tone, stone accents, engraving, chain length, and selected design details depending on the piece.

questions.q: Do you resize rings and bangles?
questions.a: Most rings and selected bangles can be resized after inspection. Stone settings and design complexity can affect what is possible.
Final pricing depends on live metal rates, weight, making charges, stone quality, certification, and custom work. We confirm estimates before purchase or production.

questions.q: Do you offer jewellery cleaning and repair?
questions.a: Yes. We offer cleaning, polish refresh, clasp checks, stone tightening, and repair guidance for eligible jewellery.
